scripts.sync: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (-not (Test-Path .git)) { throw 'Chưa có .git. Hãy chạy: git init' }; $changes = git status --porcelain; if (-not $changes) { Write-Host 'No changes to commit.'; exit 0 }; git add -A; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; git commit -m ('auto: save ' + $ts); git push"
